stemHtml: Two aircraft have comm failure. A is VFR downwind at a controlled aerodrome. B is VFR cruising at FL55. Which statement is correct?

options.a: Aircraft A should watch for visual signals from ATC.
options.b: General ICAO comm failure procedures override local procedures for both.
options.c: Aircraft B may descend through cloud to land at the nearest aerodrome.
options.d: Aircraft A need not report arrival since there is an ATC unit present.
